title: Introducing Salesforce Headless 360
summary: "Why should you ever log into Salesforce again?" Salesforce Co-Founder Parker Harris asked that question out loud last month. The result is Salesforce Headless 360: capabilities exposed as an API, MCP tool, or CLI command so humans and agents can build, act, and deliver experiences on any surface.
content: They call APIs, invoke MCP tools, and run CLI commands directly. So two and a half years ago, we made a decision: Rebuild Salesforce for agents. Instead of burying capabilities behind a UI, expose them so the entire platform will be accessible. The result is Salesforce Headless 360: the capabilities your agents need most, exposed as an API, MCP tool, or CLI command so humans and agents can build, act, and deliver experiences on any surface. Salesforce Headless 360 delivers three new innovations: New MCP tools and coding skills that give your coding agent full access to your platform. For developers, headless means you can build on Salesforce any way you want. More than 60 new MCP tools and 30+ coding skills.

title: Google launches Gemini AI Mac app, here's what it offers
summary: Google's Gemini AI app is a constant top three iPhone app in the App Store. Starting today, Gemini is available as a native Mac app with 100+ features built by a small dedicated team.
content: Starting today, Gemini is available as a native Mac app. Introducing Gemini on Mac. We heard your feedback. We recruited a small team. They built 100+ features in less than 100 days. Beyond the new Mac app, Google's Gemini is set to power upgraded Siri and Apple Intelligence features, starting with iOS 27 and macOS 27 later this year. Apple and Google have entered into a multi-year collaboration under which the next generation of Apple Foundation Models will be based on Google's Gemini models and cloud technology.

title: Google DeepMind Launches Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6
summary: Google DeepMind launched Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 on April 14, 2026. The new model advances how robots reason about physical environments, targeting key challenges in spatial understanding, task planning, and autonomous decision-making.
content: Google DeepMind Releases Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 to Advance Robot Autonomy. The new model advances how robots reason about physical environments. It targets key challenges in spatial understanding, task planning, and autonomous decision-making. The release marks a significant step in the field of embodied AI. Robots equipped with the model can now process complex visual data and act on it without constant human input. Boston Dynamics announced a partnership with Google DeepMind and Google Cloud, integrating Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 into the Orbit software platform.

title: Google Launches Native Gemini AI App for Mac
summary: Google is bringing Gemini to the Mac with a new native macOS app that's available starting today. Gemini for Mac can be activated with a keyboard shortcut and has built-in tools for generating content.
content: Google is bringing Gemini to the Mac with a new native macOS app available starting today. Gemini for Mac can be activated with a keyboard shortcut, and it has built-in tools for generating content. Gemini is the last of the three major AI services to have a dedicated Mac app, because OpenAI and Anthropic have had theirs. Gemini for Mac is available for Macs running macOS 15 and later, and it is free to download and use. Google says that the Mac app is the first step toward a personal, proactive, and powerful desktop assistant.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: New text-to-speech AI model
summary: Google introduces Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, the next generation of expressive AI speech. The newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.
content: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is here, giving you improved AI speech quality and control. You can now use audio tags to adjust speech characteristics. This model has improved speech quality, making it sound more natural than previous versions. Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS supports 70+ languages and uses SynthID watermarking to identify AI-generated audio. Today we're introducing Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, the latest text-to-speech model that delivers improved controllability, expressivity and quality.

title: DeepMind launches Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 to meet precise physical AI demands
summary: Google DeepMind's artificial intelligence research division introduced a new foundation robotics AI model. The model provides high-level reasoning capabilities for robotics, offering a layer for task planning and tool calling.
content: Google DeepMind introduced a new foundation robotics AI model designed for precise physical AI demands. The new model, Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6, provides high-level reasoning capabilities for robotics, offering a layer for task planning and tool calling. These include native tools for Google Search to find information, vision-language-action models, and environments such as factories, warehouses and even domestic spaces. Developers can access ER 1.6 via the Gemini API and Google AI Studio.
